description_long: This is a large, stately house set within a landscaped estate, surrounded by lush green lawns, mature trees, and ornamental gardens. The main building features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several dormer windows and a prominent central entrance. The property includes a circular driveway, a detached garage, and a backyard with a swimming pool and patio area. Decorative shrubs and flowering trees line the pathways and perimeter, enhancing the sense of privacy and grandeur. The house itself is constructed with light-colored walls, large windows, and classical architectural details such as columns and arched entryways. The overall layout is symmetrical, with the main house centrally positioned and auxiliary structures and landscaping elements arranged harmoniously around it.
description: A grand, multi-story house with a gabled roof, central entrance, and extensive landscaped grounds featuring a pool, driveway, and lush gardens. The estate is surrounded by mature trees and decorative plantings, giving it a stately and private appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and gardens.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, auxiliary structures, and the expanse of the landscaped grounds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and dense tree line providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional garden features, pathways, and the arrangement of outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows and dormers
attribute_entryway_design: Grand central entryway with double doors, steps, columns, and an arched overhang
